Class GameController

java.lang.Object
com.cluegame.gui.GameController
public class GameController extends Object
Controller for the JavaFX GUI turn flow. Manages movement, suggestions, accusations and turn advancement without touching console I/O. Handles both human and AI player turns through the GUI.
Author:
Thanh Shaw

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    advanceToNextPlayer()
    Advances to the next active player.
    boolean
    checkAccusation(Accusation accusation)
    Checks an accusation against the murder envelope.
    void
    endMove()
    Ends the current player's movement early.
    void
    enterCurrentDoor()
    Enters the room at the current player's position (after landing on a door).
    String
    exitRoom(int optionIndex)
    Exits the current player from their room via the chosen option index.
    private int[]
    findAnyValidDirection(Player ai)
    Falls back to any valid single-step move if no route to a door is found.
    private int[]
    findBestDirection(Player ai)
    Finds the next step for an AI player to move, following a shortest reachable path toward a room door rather than using a greedy Manhattan-distance heuristic.
    private int[]
    findPathStepToAnyDoor(Player ai, List<Square> targets)
    Runs a breadth-first search from the AI's current position and returns the first step on a shortest reachable path to any target door.
    private int[]
    findPathStepToRoom(Player ai, String roomName)

  • Constructor Details

    • GameController

      public GameController(Game game)
      Creates a controller for the given game state.
      Parameters:
      game - the Game instance (provides board, dice, players, envelope, non-player suspects, weapon positions)

  • Method Details

    • rollDice

      public int rollDice()
      Rolls the dice and starts the movement phase for the current player.
      Returns:
      the dice roll total

    • getValidMoves

      public List<int[]> getValidMoves()
      Returns the list of valid squares the current player can move to.
      Returns:
      list of {row, col} arrays for valid destinations

    • tryMove

      public GameController.MoveResult tryMove(int targetRow, int targetCol)
      Attempts to move the current player to the given row/col.
      Parameters:
      targetRow - the target row
      targetCol - the target column
      Returns:
      a MoveResult describing what happened

    • endMove

      public void endMove()
      Ends the current player's movement early.

    • getRoomExitOptions

      public List<String> getRoomExitOptions()
      Returns the list of exit options for a player currently in a room.
      Returns:
      list of exit descriptions

    • exitRoom

      public String exitRoom(int optionIndex)
      Exits the current player from their room via the chosen option index.
      Parameters:
      optionIndex - the index from getRoomExitOptions()
      Returns:
      description of what happened

    • isDoorBlocked

      private boolean isDoorBlocked(Square door, Player excluding)

    • resolveSuggestion

      public GameController.SuggestionResult resolveSuggestion(Suggestion suggestion)
      Resolves a suggestion by going clockwise from the current player.
      Parameters:
      suggestion - the suggestion to resolve
      Returns:
      the result of the suggestion resolution

    • moveSuspectToRoom

      private void moveSuspectToRoom(Suggestion suggestion, Room room)

    • checkAccusation

      public boolean checkAccusation(Accusation accusation)
      Checks an accusation against the murder envelope.
      Parameters:
      accusation - the accusation to check
      Returns:
      true if the accusation is correct

    • runAITurn

      public List<String> runAITurn()
      Runs a complete AI turn: movement, suggestion, accusation. Returns a list of log messages describing what happened.
      Returns:
      list of log messages for the AI turn

    • handleAIAccusation

      private void handleAIAccusation(AIPlayer ai, Accusation accusation, List<String> log)

    • moveAITowardRoom

      private void moveAITowardRoom(AIPlayer ai, List<String> log)
      Moves an AI player toward a room they haven't just exited, using dice roll and step-by-step pathfinding.

    • findBestDirection

      private int[] findBestDirection(Player ai)
      Finds the next step for an AI player to move, following a shortest reachable path toward a room door rather than using a greedy Manhattan-distance heuristic.

    • findPathStepToRoom

      private int[] findPathStepToRoom(Player ai, String roomName)

    • findPathStepToAnyDoor

      private int[] findPathStepToAnyDoor(Player ai, List<Square> targets)
      Runs a breadth-first search from the AI's current position and returns the first step on a shortest reachable path to any target door.

    • findAnyValidDirection

      private int[] findAnyValidDirection(Player ai)
      Falls back to any valid single-step move if no route to a door is found.

    • advanceToNextPlayer

      public void advanceToNextPlayer()
      Advances to the next active player. Returns true if the next player is human (needs interactive turn), false if AI (caller should run AI turn).

    • isCurrentPlayerAI

      public boolean isCurrentPlayerAI()
      Returns true if the current player is an AI player.

    • isCurrentPlayerHuman

      public boolean isCurrentPlayerHuman()
      Returns true if the current player is a human player.

    • getCurrentPlayer

      public Player getCurrentPlayer()

    • getPlayers

      public List<Player> getPlayers()

    • getRemainingSteps

      public int getRemainingSteps()

      public boolean isMovementActive()

      public Board getBoard()

      public boolean isGameOver()

    • getWinner

      public Player getWinner()

    • getEnvelope

      public MurderEnvelope getEnvelope()

    • getGame

      public Game getGame()

    • setSuggestionCardChooser

      public void setSuggestionCardChooser(GameController.SuggestionCardChooser chooser)

    • getSuspects

      public static String[] getSuspects()

    • getWeapons

      public static String[] getWeapons()

    • enterCurrentDoor

      public void enterCurrentDoor()
      Enters the room at the current player's position (after landing on a door). Call this when the player chooses to enter rather than walk past.
